title: Nephrodium davallioides

This family is a part of the larger class Polypodiopsida, which consists of various ferns and their allies. The class Polypodiopsida is further divided into several orders, with Nephrodium davallioides being a part of the order Polypodiales. The order Polypodiales is a group of ferns that share similar characteristics and growth habits. Nephrodium davallioides is also classified as a member of the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes all the ferns and their relatives.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
